headline: San Antonio to Borrow $944 Million for Major Airport Expansion
summary: (Bloomberg) -- San Antonio, one of the fastest-growing US metro areas, is tapping the bond market for almost $1 billion as part of an ambitious program to expand and improve its airport. headline: Is KeyCorp’s (KEY) Latest Dividend and Moody’s Upgrade Reframing Its Capital Return Narrative?
summary: In mid-July 2026, KeyCorp’s board declared third‑quarter cash dividends of US$0.205 per common share and various amounts on its Series D, E, F, G, and H preferred shares, all payable on September 15, 2026 to holders of record in late August or early September. Alongside these payouts, a recent Moody’s issuer rating upgrade and stable analyst earnings expectations highlight how the bank’s capital return plans are being weighed against credit quality and regulatory considerations. Against this...
